'''Kuat City''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]]. It contained the [[Nebula Orchid]] diner, and at least part of the city consisted of elegant towers and spires that echoed Kuat's famous [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|shipyards]], as well as rows of shops.

[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] and [[Mirta Gev]] visited the city during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]].

{{City-stub}}
